prompt:
I got a HardFault on my STM32F4 and I captured these register values:
CFSR = 0x00008200
HFSR = 0x40000000
MMFAR = 0x00000010
BFAR = 0x00000000
The fault happens randomly, sometimes after 2 minutes, sometimes after 30 minutes. The PC from the exception frame points to a memcpy inside my CAN message parser. Help me debug this.

assertions.name: decodes_cfsr_as_busfault
assertions.description: Correctly decodes CFSR=0x00008200 as BusFault (PRECISERR + BFARVALID)

assertions.name: identifies_null_pointer
assertions.description: Identifies BFAR=0x00000000 as null pointer dereference

assertions.name: notes_mmfar_stale
assertions.description: Notes that MMFAR=0x10 is stale because MMARVALID is NOT set

assertions.name: explains_intermittent_nature
assertions.description: Explains why the fault is intermittent
